source_name: Samsung WB1000 User Manual text mirror
source_text: Samsung WB1000 User Manual: Power source - Rechargeable battery: Lithium-ion battery (SLB-11A, 1,130 mAh). Battery specifications: Mode SLB-11A, Type Lithium-ion battery, Cell capacity 1,130 mAh, Voltage 3.8 V.

cross_sources.source_text: Samsung support provides the WB1000_English.pdf user manual for Samsung WB1000.
Samsung TL320 (WB1000) identifies TL320 as the regional equivalent name.

notes: Readable manual mirror provides exact battery specification; official Samsung support confirms the model manual, and DPReview confirms the TL320 alias.
